title: Permanent Employment Certification (PERM) Online Filing Release Notes 07/30/2025 | Flag.dol.gov
content:
## Permanent Employment Certification (PERM) Online Filing Release Notes 07/30/2025
PERM 9089 filers will find a new feature on the Case Details page. A new tab, named "External Case Actions," can be found next to Case Documents. This new tab will display case actions by the filer with new information, including the name and email of the filer who performed case actions.
